name: EdgeRiskAsmntSubmsnYrExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT RISK_ADJ_YR FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDGERiskAsmntOwner}.RISK_ADJ_SUBMSN_CTL WHERE @{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate} >= RISK_ADJ_SUBMSN_BEG_DT AND @{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate} <= RISK_ADJ_SUBMSN_END_DT

Description:
Â© Copyright 2014 Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Kansas City

JOB NAME:  EdgeRiskAsmntSubmsnYrExtr

DESCRIPTION:  This job is called by several EDGE Control jobs to see if the Medical, Enrollment, Pharmacy and Response files contain data which falls in the given date range.

CALLED BY:  Several Edge Control Jobs





MODIFICATIONS:

Annotations:
RISK_ADJ_YR from the RISK_ADJ_SUBMSN_CTL table is loaded to the file only when 
'#CurrDate#' >= RISK_ADJ_SUBMSN_BEG_DT AND
'#CurrDate#' <= RISK_ADJ_SUBMSN_END_DT
